plugins.name: iac-terraform
plugins.description: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and Terragrunt. Use for .tf files, modules, state management, CI/CD, and Terragrunt patterns.

plugins.name: k8s-troubleshooter
plugins.description: Systematic Kubernetes troubleshooting and incident response. Use for pod failures, cluster issues, networking, storage, Helm, and performance.

plugins.name: aws-cost-optimization
plugins.description: AWS cost optimization and FinOps workflows. Use for unused resources, rightsizing, Reserved Instances, Spot, cost anomalies, and budgets.

plugins.name: ci-cd
plugins.description: CI/CD pipeline design, optimization, DevSecOps, and troubleshooting. Use for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, security scanning, and build optimization.

plugins.name: monitoring-observability
plugins.description: Monitoring and observability strategy. Use for metrics, logs, traces, alerting, SLOs, Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, OpenTelemetry, and tool selection.

plugins.name: gitops-workflows
plugins.description: GitOps deployment workflows with ArgoCD and Flux. Use for GitOps setup, repository structure, multi-cluster, secrets, progressive delivery, and sync issues.
